<h1 align="center">Hi, I'm Zacky Al Giffari 👋</h1>
<h3 align="center">AI Engineer & Data Scientist</h3>

<p align="center">
  Building LLM-powered & agentic systems and applied data science for media & broadcast.
</p>

---

### 🧠 About Me
- 🤖 I focus on **LLM & agentic systems** and **applied data science** — from prototype to production.
- 🎬 I build **AI for media & broadcast**: ad detection & recognition, auto clip generation, **Media Asset Management (MAM)**, and **AI video & thumbnail generation**.
- 📈 Data science end-to-end: **dynamic pricing / MLOps**, computer vision, and analytics.
- 🌱 Currently exploring **agentic workflows (LangGraph / MCP)**, **vector databases**, and **LLM evaluation**.

### 🚀 Featured Work
- **AI for Media & Broadcast** — automated ad detection & recognition, Media Asset Management (MAM) with AI tagging & search, and AI video / thumbnail + auto-clip generation.
- **Dynamic Pricing Engine (MLOps)** — gradient-boosted pricing for TV airtime with an end-to-end train → promote → monitor pipeline (DuckDB + FastAPI + React dashboard).
- **Computer Vision & NLP** — detection/recognition systems and text-mining models (sentiment, classification), prototype to deployment.
- **Developer Tooling** — LLM & agent tooling, including fast local MCP-based code indexing.
